title: chrysosplenium alternifolium subsp. alternifolium
intro: Chrysosplenium alternifolium subsp. alternifolium, also known as yellow spleenwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Saxifragaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Chrysosplenium alternifolium subsp. alternifolium can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
